titleStmt.title: SII 37.538: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 538. (A.R. No. B 40 of 1943-44.) Bōyaṟēvula, Nandikotkur Taluk, Kurnool District.

summary.p: Slab lying in the compound of the Chennakēśava temple.
This is dated Śaka 1482, Raudri, Āshāḍha śu. 12, corresponding to 1560 A.D., July 12, Thursday.

It registers a gift of land made to Maṅgala Aṅkōju for performing the pipe and drum. Service to god Tiruveṅgalanātha-dēva of Gurudūru by mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Timmarājayyadēva Mahārāju, son of Gaṅgarājayya and grandson of mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Apratīkamalla Kuruchēṭi Sōmarājayyadēva Chōḍa-Mahārāju of the solar race and Kāśyapa-gōtra. The gift lands are stated to be situated in the village Bōyaṟēvula which was included in the Siddāpuraṁ-sīma which was given to the donors as amara by Rāmarāju-Timma Rājayyadēva Mahārāju.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu .
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbu
lu 1482 Agunēṭi raudri saṁvatsara Āṣāḍha śu 12 lu
śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīrapra
tāpa śrī sadāśivadēva mahārāyaluṁgāru
vidyānagaramaṁdu ratnasiṁhāsanāsīnuṁḍai pṛthivi sāmrā
jyaṁ cēyucuṁḍaṁgānu sūryavaṁśādhīśvarulaIna kāsyapa gō
tra pavitṛlaina śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara Apratīkamalla kuruceṭi sō
marājayyadēva cōḍamahārājuluṁgāri pautṛlunnu gaṁgarājayya putru
luṁnaina timmarājayyadēvamahārājuluṁgāru bōyarēvula maṁgaḷa Aṁkōjugā
riki yiccina dharmaśāsanaṁ . rāmarāju tiṁmarājayyadēvamahārājuluṁgāru
māku Amarānku pāliṁcina siddhāpuraṁ sīmalōni bōyarēvulagrāmaṁ gumu
ḍūri caṁnakēśava perumāḷlaku ḍōḷanāgasarāla śēvaśēśē Aṁduku bōyarēvulanu
mīku peṭṭina mānyaṁ . varimaḍi polamēra karaṇaṁ Akkarājucēniki dakṣiṇaṁ cēnu
khaṁ . 0 varimaḍi pedaceruvuvenaka mōtukūri polamēra vīrabhadradēvara maḍi
ki vuttaraṁ m 0 . pāṭimīdi gollapāṭi tiṁmana Aḍḍalōnu m 0 . vubhaya
m 1Akṣarālacēnu paṁdumu maḍimarutukunnu yī tathātidhi puṇyakāla
maṁdu mātāta sōmalrājuṁgāriki puṇyaṁgānu yistimi . mīru dēvuni sē
vaśēśi mīputrapautrapāraṁparyamugānu Anubhaviṁci bradikēdi Ani yicci
na dharmaśāsanaṁ . yī dharmānaku yavvaru Anukūlaṁ Ayi naḍaciri vārurarē
parama bhāgavatulu . yī puṇyānaku yavaru tappinānu kāsilōnu
gōbrāhmalānu tamatallitaṁḍḍilanu vadhiṁcina pāpāna pōvu
vāru śunaka māṁsamunu surānu sēviṁcina dōṣāna pōI
na vāru . maṁgaḷamahā śrīśrīśrīṁ jēyunū .
Digital edition of SII 37.538 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
